name: Frenzy
desc: When you down a unit, gain +2 [img:str].

name: Frenzy2
desc: When you down a unit, gain +2 [img:str] and +2 [img:spd].

name: Avenger
desc: When an allied cat is downed, gain All Stats Up 2 and heal 8.

name: Avenger2
desc: When an allied cat is downed, gain All Stats Up 2, heal 50% of your max HP, and take an extra turn.

name: Scars
desc: +1 Brace.

name: Scars2
desc: +3 Brace.

name: Hulk Up
desc: When you take damage, gain +2 [img:spd].

name: HulkUp2
desc: When you take damage, gain +2 [img:spd] and +10% dodge. This caps at 50%.

name: Fervor
desc: When you down a unit, you heal 5 HP.

name: Fervor2
desc: When you down a unit, you heal 50% of your HP.

name: Vengeful
desc: Your basic attack is always critical on enemies that have damaged you.

name: Vengeful2
desc:
Your basic attack is always critical on enemies units that have damaged you.
Inflict Marked on units that contact or attack you.

name: Hamster Style
desc:
+1 Health Regeneration.
Start with 2 Bonus Moves.

name: HamsterStyle2
desc:
+2 Health Regeneration.
Start with 2 Bonus Moves.
Your basic attack has a chance to attack multiple times.

name: Weapon Master
desc: Your weapon and item abilities deal +2 Damage and get +25% critical chance. A pipe is added to your inventory.

name: WeaponMaster2
desc:
Your weapon and item abilities deal +3 Damage and get +50% critical chance.
If you don't have a weapon, gain a random temporary weapon at the beginning of the battle.

name: Shoulder Check
desc: If you're facing a unit after you move, automatically attack it at 33% damage.

name: ShoulderCheck2
desc: If you're facing a unit after you move, automatically attack the unit.

name: Skullcrack
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise.

name: Skullcrack2
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise 2.

name: TurtleStyle2
desc: +2 Brace

name: OVERPOWERED!!!
desc: Excess damage you deal to units makes them explode, dealing the excess damage to units around it, except for you.

name: OVERPOWERED2
desc: Excess damage you deal to units makes them explode, dealing the excess damage to units within 2 tiles of it, except for you.

name: Underdog
desc: You have +2 [img:str] and +1 Brace for each enemy adjacent to you.

name: Underdog2
desc: You have +3 [img:str] and +2 Brace for each enemy adjacent to you.

name: Math?
desc: Your spells cost 3 mana to cast, but each can be cast only once per turn.

name: Math2
desc: Your spells cost 0 mana to cast, but each can be cast only once per turn.

name: Dumb Muscle
desc:
Lose 1 [img:int] each time you take damage.
If you have 4 or less [img:int], gain +2 [img:str] and your basic attack inflicts Bruise. at 0 [img:int], gain +100% critical hit chance.

name: DumbMuscle2
desc:
Lose 2 [img:int] each time you take damage.
If you have 4 or less [img:int], gain +2 [img:str] and your basic attack inflicts Bruise. At 0 [img:int], gain +100% critical hit chance. At -10 [img:int], you can use your basic move and attack an additional time each turn.

name: Thick Skull
desc:
All injuries you get are Concussions.
You get +3 [img:shield] for each concussion you have. This caps at 30 [img:shield].

name: ThickSkull2
desc:
All injuries you get are Concussions.
You get +3 [img:shield] and +1 [img:str] for each concussion you have. This caps at 30 [img:shield] and 10 [img:str].

name: Most Valuable Cat
desc:
When you or an ally downs another unit, they become the Alpha.
If you're the Alpha, take an extra turn at the end of each round.

name: MostValuableCat2
desc:
You start the battle as the Alpha.
Whenever you or an ally downs another unit, they become the Alpha.
If you're the Alpha, take an extra turn at the end of each round.

name: Rat Style
desc: +10% dodge chance.

name: RatStyle2
desc: +30% dodge chance.

name: Boned
desc: When you kill a unit, if you don't have a weapon, gain a Bone Club.

name: Boned2
desc:
When you kill a unit, if you don't have a weapon, gain a Bone Club.
Bonus Ability: Throw Weapon.

name: Dual Wield
desc: When you use your weapon, automatically use it again for free.

name: DualWield2
desc: When you use your weapon, automatically use it again for free, and then again! for free!

name: Patellar Reflex
desc: When a unit damages you, counter-attack dealing 1 damage and inflicting Bruise.

name: PatellarReflex2
desc: When a unit damages you, counter-attack with your basic attack and inflict Bruise.

name: Hit Me
desc:
When you take damage from an ally, basic attack in the direction you're facing.
Damage you take from allies is reduced to 1.

name: HitMe2
desc:
When you take damage from an ally, basic attack in the direction you're facing.
Damage you take from allies is reduced to 1.
Whenever you take damage, gain +1 to a random stat.

name: Smash!
desc:
Your weapons deal triple damage, but they always break when you use them.
Three Sticks are added to your inventory.

name: Smash2
desc:
Your weapons deal triple damage, but they have a 50% chance to break when you use them.
Three more Sticks are added to your inventory.

name: Punch Face
desc: Your basic attacks are critical if they hit the front of a unit.

name: PunchFace2
desc: Your physical attacks are critical if they hit the front of a unit.

name: Merciless
desc:
When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield] and refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This doesn't trigger during your movement action.)[/s]

name: Merciless2
desc:
When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield], All Stats Up, and refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This doesn't trigger during your movement action.)[/s]
